name: EP-F07 Health And Wellness Appointments - Draft Preview

options.text:
[care] Private Appointment Request
Looking for an Erie County appointment?

Keep this brief and private. Start with the type of care, then choose a contact window.

Choose the closest path. You can still change direction later.
Start with one quick choice. Contact details come after the request is clear.

items.text: [cal] Dental, vision, skin, hearing, or therapy

options.text: Please avoid detailed medical history here. A provider can follow up privately.

options.text:
[care] Private Appointment Request
Prefer a softer first step?

You do not need to share detailed medical history here. A brief appointment reason is enough.

This is the low-pressure path: save it, ask a question, or get routed from context.
You can stay with the free match. No pressure.

[care] Private Appointment Request
Appointment request received. Details can be handled privately with the provider.
Thanks. Erie.Pro will use the service-family context before routing this request.
